description: peer-queue --flush with a queued row whose home_host has no remotes.json entry: Python skips it (no attempts bump) and counts it as still_failing. AGENT_COLLAB_REMOTES points at a non-existent path so load_remotes() returns the empty map on both impls.
pre_sql: INSERT INTO pending_outbound (message_id, home_host, pair_key, from_label, to_label, body, created_at, attempts, last_attempt_at, last_error) VALUES ('01HZABC123', 'no-such-host', 'dusty-island-8114', 'backend', 'frontend', 'hello', '2030-01-01T00:00:00Z', 3, '2030-01-01T00:00:05Z', 'connection refused');
